sql: SELECT strategy_id, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN status='closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closed, SUM(CASE WHEN status='failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed, SUM(CASE WHEN live_error IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS errs, SUM(CASE WHEN copy_event_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_evid, date(MIN(entry_ts),'unixepoch') AS first_day, date(MAX(entry_ts),'unixepoch') AS last_day, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(net_sol,0)),4) AS net_sol, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(jito_tip_sol,0)),5) AS jito, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(ata_rent_sol,0)),5) AS rent, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN status='closed' THEN tx_land_ms END),0) AS land_ms FROM copy_trades WHERE execution_mode='live_micro' GROUP BY strategy_id ORDER BY n DESC
